page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-90 is a general-purpose server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor based on the x86_64 architecture. It features 90 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 45 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 360 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU accelerators, and it comes with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core and PassMark CPU scores placing in the top 10% of tested systems. Software compilation with Clang and PassMark encryption tests also achieve top-tier status. Memory performance is strong, with cached read-only bandwidth reaching 6374.91 GB/sec and uncached large-block read bandwidth at 217.54 GB/sec, though large-block write bandwidth is average at 77.61 GB/sec. Redis SET operations demonstrate top-tier throughput at 118.12 million operations per second.

The instance offers high resource density and compute efficiency for multi-threaded workloads, though the lack of local NVMe storage requires external network-attached storage solutions. The absence of GPU hardware limits its utility for heavy deep learning training, though it maintains strong performance for medium-model LLM prompt processing. It is suited for compute-heavy tasks, software compilation, database operations, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-90 is a general-purpose server featuring 90 dedicated vCPUs and 360 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor on the x86_64 architecture. With 45 physical cores and a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core, this instance delivers top-tier multi-core performance, ranking in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core, PassMark CPU, and software compilation benchmarks. It lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, representing a tradeoff that prioritizes pure compute and memory capacity. Memory read bandwidth is strong, though write bandwidth remains average. This configuration is suited for multi-threaded workloads, software compilation, database operations, and static web serving.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-90 is a general-purpose server with 90 vCPUs and 360 GB RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 CPU, delivering top-tier multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-90 features 90 vCPUs, 360 GB RAM, and an AMD EPYC CPU, delivering top-tier multi-core benchmark performance.
tagline: A dedicated AMD EPYC processor instance with balanced memory allocation and top-tier multi-core performance for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 90 dedicated vCPUs and 45 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor.
360 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core.
Top-tier multi-core performance in stress-ng and PassMark CPU benchmarks.
No local storage or GPU accelerators included in the base configuration.
Suited for software compilation, database operations, and multi-threaded applications.
